description: WAF dataset schema for raw and labeled request records

raw_fields.uri: string — full URI with query string
raw_fields.headers_subset: object — Host, User-Agent, Content-Type, Accept only
raw_fields.body_len_original: number — original body length before truncation

labeled_extra_fields.attack_type: string — NONE | SQL_INJECTION | XSS | PATH_TRAVERSAL | COMMAND_INJECTION | UNKNOWN_ATTACK

file_format: JSON Lines (.jsonl), one JSON object per line
